title: Bombs and Lemons
description: Adds different bombs to minecraft along with lemons
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9152ee68f7abfa90ce86872cd402c8e167b5c70.png)



This mod adds many different bombs to minecraft. They all have different effects, some being destructive and some helpful.

![seperator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a13baa56a1278aecf59d5587e6d5f48f6219d76.png)


<details>
<summary>Bombs</summary>

<details>
<summary>Regular Bomb</summary>

The regular bomb can be crafted with gunpowder, iron and string. Right-clicking will throw the bomb, and crouching then right-clicking will throw it furter with a longer cooldown.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Amethyst Bomb</summary>

The amethyst bomb can be crafted with amethyst, gunpowder and string. It leaves a lingering glowing potion effect.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Poison Bomb</summary>
  
The poison bomb can be crafted with spider eyes, gunpowder and string. It leaves a lingering poison potion effect.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Creeper Bomb</summary>

The creeper bomb can be crafted with TNT, gunpowder and string. When it explodes, it summons four creepers and has a slightly larger explosion.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Pipe Bomb</summary>
  
The pipe bomb can be crafted with coal, gunpowder and tnt. It explodes on the player, launching them the opposite direction they are looking. The explosion deals no damage to the caster.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Fire Bomb</summary>

The fire bomb can be crafted with iron, fireballs and flint a steel. When exploding, it leaves fire and has a more scatter-like explosion.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Ice Bomb</summary>

The ice bomb can be crafted with iron, gunpowder and powder snow. When exploding it freezes nearby mobs for 600 ticks (30 seconds).

</details>
<details>
<summary>Mine Bomb</summary>

The mine bomb can be crafted with any stone, gunpowder and string. It breaks a 3x3 area, leaving items in the centre.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Healing Bomb</summary>

The healing bomb can be crafted will glistering melons, gunpowder and string. It causes no explosion, but heals up to nearly full health.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Levitation Bomb</summary>
  
The levitation bom can be crafted with shulker shells, gunpowder, endstone and string. When exploding, it causes near mobs to levitate.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Ender Bomb</summary>


The ender bomb can be crafted with chorus fruit, gunpowder and string. When exploding, it causes near mobs to be teleported up to 20 blocks away.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Iron, Gold, Emerald, Diamond, Netherite Bomb</summary>


The iron, gold, emerald and diamond bomb can be crafted by surrounding a bomb with the corresponding mineral. As the tier upgrades of the bomb, so does the explosion power. The netherite bomb can be crafted with netherite, a bomb and a diamond bomb.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Oxygen Bomb</summary>


The oxygen bomb can be crafted with sponges, gunpowder and string. When exploding it deals drowning damage and sets oxygen to 0.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Pearl Bomb</summary>


The pearl bomb can be crafted with ender pearls, gunpowder and string. When thrown, the thrower will be attached to the bomb, unable to move until it lands.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Cobweb Bomb</summary>


The cobweb bomb can be crafted with cobwebs, gunpowder and string. When exploding, it places a few cobwebs, and places some on entities near.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Wind Bomb</summary>


The wind bomb can be crafted with wind charges, gunpowder and string. When exploding, it shoots entities(including items) upwards with random X and Z velocity. 

</details>
<details>
<summary>Radioactive Bomb</summary>


The radioactive bomb can be crafted with enchanted lemons, TNT and string. When thrown, they have an extremely high power. A totem is greatly recommended when using this bomb.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Wither Bomb</summary>


The wither bomb can be crafted with wither roses, gunpowder and string. When exploding it gives nearby entities the wither effect.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Thunder Bomb</summary>

The thunder bomb cn be crafted with iron, gunpowder and a lightning rod. When exploding it strikes nearby entities with lightning.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Lemon Bomb</summary>


The lemon bomb can be crafted with golden lemons, lemons and string. When exploding it drops exploding lemons from the sky.
</details>
</details>

Lemons, golden lemons and enchanted lemons can be obtained from ancient cities.
